dashboard.label: Drop Reasons Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Drop reason monitoring with data retained for 14 days

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats dc(eval(device_name + ":" + interface_name)) as interfaces_with_drops

panel.title: Total New Drop Reason Drops per Device

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats sum(drop_increment) as total_new_drops by device_name | sort -total_new_drops

index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats sum(drop_increment) as "New Drops" by drop_reason | sort - "New Drops" | head 10

index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | timechart span=5m sum(drop_increment) as "Drop Reason Increments"

index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(drop_increment) as "New Drops",
by drop_reason | sort - "New Drops" | head 15 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

panel.title: Top Drop Reasons by Interface (New Drops)

search.query:
index=main analyzer_type="drop_reason" | where NOT (device_name="TEST-DEVICE-01" OR device_name="test-device") | eval device_interface_reason = device_name + ":" + interface_name + ":" + drop_reason | sort 0 _time device_interface_reason | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_interface_reason | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(drop_increment) as "New Drops",
values(drop_reason) as "Drop Reasons" by device_name, interface_name | eval "Drop Reasons" = mvjoin('Drop Reasons', ", ") | sort - "New Drops" | head 25 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
